query:
UPDATE musicVideoScenes SET mvSceneStatus = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Atlas Cloud timeout — auto-failed by reaper', taskId = NULL WHERE id IN (510043, 510071);
UPDATE providerJobLogs SET pjlStatus = 'cancelled', failedAt = NOW() WHERE sceneId IN (510043, 510071) AND pjlStatus IN ('submitted', 'pending');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute UPDATE musicVideoScenes SET mvSceneStatus = 'failed', errorMessage = 'Atlas Cloud timeout — auto-failed by reaper', taskId = NULL WHERE id IN (510043, 510071);
UPDATE providerJobLogs SET pjlStatus = 'cancelled', failedAt = NOW() WHERE sceneId IN (510043, 510071) AND pjlStatus IN ('submitted', 'pending');
